title: athyrium protensum
intro: Athyrium protensum, also known as the Lady fern, is a type of flowering plant in the Athyrium genus that is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, colds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Athyrium protensum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and asthma. Athyrium protensum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
